engineering.translation: Continuing the enumeration: while speaking, releasing, grasping, opening and closing the eyes — the yoked one knows: 'the senses (indriyāṇi) are operating among sense-objects (indriyārtheṣu).' The verse extends 5.8 with a second list of bodily operations and the same structural observation. The engineering analog: the senior who watches her own decision-making process — the closing of one tab, the opening of another, the typing of a comment, the release of a stuck idea — and observes the operations as movements, not as identity-events. Speaking in the standup is not 'I speak'; it is the speaking-organ producing speech among speech-objects. Grasping the keyboard is not 'I grasp'; it is the grasping-organ engaging the keyboard-object. The seer's posture is one in which the doer-position is empty across every micro-operation. STRETCHED honestly; the metaphysics exceeds the operational layer at the same point as 5.8.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A senior engineer types a code-review comment on a contractor's PR. The comment is technically rigorous, names a missing edge-case in the Postgres transaction-isolation logic, and proposes the specific fix. She observes her hand close the GitHub-PR tab, observes her hand open the Datadog-monitoring tab, observes her hand reach for the coffee cup. Across forty seconds of typing-then-cup-grasping the operations have happened; the doer-position has been empty. She has not been the comment-typer, the tab-opener, the cup-grasper. The seer's posture has not slipped. This is not depersonalisation — the work is done with full skill — it is the structural observation 5.8-5.9 describe. The metaphysics reaches further than the engineering analog can carry; the engg layer scopes operationally to the decoupled-identity-during-action observation. The cross-reference inventory: Kafka, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Jenkins.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears the verse as endorsing a kind of distance from the work or a stoic flatness in the workplace. The passage names the seer's interior observation, not a behavioural surface. The behaviour can be lively, engaged, even passionate; the interior is decoupled. Anyone reading this as 'be a robot' has misread the verse.
engineering.counter_example: When an engineer claims the seer-of-truth's posture without having cultivated it — when the 'doer-position is empty' is rhetorical rather than experiential — the verse does not apply. The verse names a state of the tattva-vit (knower of truth); the claim cannot be made without the prior cultivation that produces the seeing.
engineering.implication: During your next forty-second micro-operation — typing a comment, closing a tab, drinking coffee — notice whether the doer-position is empty. The verse's claim is testable in micro-windows.
engineering.quotable_line: Speaking, releasing, grasping, opening the eyes — the senses operate; the seer is not the operating senses.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 5.9 engineering layer drafted from triangulated source pack. Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
